name: xauusd_london_range_breakout_m5
hypothesis: XAUUSD exhibits volatility expansion during the London open following Asia-session accumulation; a breakout of the Asia range during 07:00-10:00 UTC with an ATR-normalized body produces positive expectancy when the range is neither too tight nor exhausted.

regime_filter.description: Only trade when current ATR is in mid-to-high volatility regime; avoid dead Asia sessions and post-news exhaustion.

entry_rules.long: Price closes above Asia range high by >= 0.5*ATR(14) with candle body >= 1.2*ATR(14), within first 12 bars of London window, Asia range between 0.5*ATR and 2.0*ATR.
entry_rules.short: Mirror of long on Asia range low.

exit_rules.time_stop: Close at 15:00 UTC if neither hit
exit_rules.trailing: Move SL to breakeven after +1.0*ATR favorable
